channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Damaged post, 13th June
item.description:
Outside Brampton Primary School , Brampton Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brampton Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food delivery van not moved for 6 weeks, 13th June
item.description:
Red coloured van - PE63UDJ been parked for past 6 wks....number plate doesn't correspond with vehicle
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge fly tipped @ bus stop, 13th June
item.description:
Opposite 68 Maberley Road, at the Belvedere Road (eastbound) bus stop, a under counter fridge has been dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 111, Belvedere Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown Tree with Broken Branches., 13th June
item.description:
Tree overgrown with ivy is dropping large branches into back garden and is a risk of falling branches damaging property, fences.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ladysmith Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smelly blocked drain, 13th June
item.description:
The drain outside the imperial chef is blocked with leaves and other debris and it also stinks. Please can this and other drains in the street be cleaned?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A man on a black ford Kuga drove through the woods and made an exit by Stone Park Avenue. His vehicle destroyed the wooden post that is positioned to stop vehicles using the woods., 13th June
item.description:
The post needs to be replaced and the owner of the car should pay for this.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Eden Park Road, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On Torbay Road, 13th June
item.description:
Found a dead cat which is sad

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Torbay Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Dead animal on street

item.title: Is this tree dangerous to pedestrians?, 13th June
item.description:
Please find attached 2 photos. One shows the significant branch that fell down (your ref 9562016) the other shows the current condition of the tree. Thank you for your prompt response when clearing away the fallen branch. The tree currently overhangs the pavement and to my untrained eye looks unbalanced and unsafe. The fallen branch had rotted from the inside. If the remainder of the tree is in the same condition then there is the possibility that the other branch may fall. Can you please assure me that this tree is safe for me and other members of the public to walk under. Thank you Robert Bunce

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cranmore Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole outside shops with parking, 13th June
item.description:
This pothole has been here for many weeks and is extremely large almost a metre in diameter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bexley Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on side of end terrace, it is being added to., 13th June
item.description:
Graffiti on the side of a house on Nunhead Grove on the opening to Belvedere Mews. Has been present for over a year and it is being added to.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belvedere Mews, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street very dirty attracting vermin, 13th June
item.description:
Finland Road has not been swept for months in addition to Fly tipping outside the school there is a lot of rubbish including food stuffs
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48-78, Revelon Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large trunk of bay tree fallen, 13th June
item.description:
A large section of this bay tree has fallen and there is another large tru k which has also fallen but is being supported by other branches. A big gust of wind looks like it could take it down and cause an injury if anyone is too close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gorefield Place, London

item.description:

item.title: Dead fox body, 13th June
item.description:
Dead fox body laying on a wall in our communal space, very smelly and not nice for people to see
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nichol Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tactile paving slabs loose at Whadcoat St, 13th June
item.description:
The middle tactile paving tile is loose and pivots downwards a couple of inches when stepped on - it's probably enough to cause someone to stumble

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whadcoat Street, Finsbury Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)

item.title: Tree with dead branches, 13th June
item.description:
This tree has many dead branches which sway precariously in high winds. This is a main road and many children use the route to school. These branches are likely to break off and hit a car/person if not pruned back. It is easy to see which branches are dead at this time of year.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footscray Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
